title: Dioscorea pseudorajanioides
taxonomy: Dioscorea pseudorajanioides is classified within the family Dioscoreaceae, which is a group of yam species. This species is further classified within the genus Dioscorea, which comprises over 600 species of yams and wild yams. The species Dioscorea pseudorajanioides is native to tropical Africa, where it is found growing in the wild. Its classification into the Dioscoreaceae family indicates that it is a member of the yam family, which also includes other species such as Dioscorea rotundata. The exact classification of Dioscorea pseudorajanioides may vary depending on the source and specific taxonomic criteria used.
